sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ تَجْتَمِعُ كُلَّ جُمُعَةٍ عِنْدَ الْجَدِّ.
sentences.translation: Porodica se svake subote skupljala kod djeda.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathered every Friday at their grandfather's house.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَدُّ يَحْكِي قِصَصًا مِنْ أَيَّامِهِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Djed je pričao priče iz svojih starih dana.
sentences.translationEn: The grandfather used to tell stories from his old days.

sentences.translation: Djeca su sjedila oko njega i pažljivo slušala.
sentences.translationEn: The children sat around him and listened carefully.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تِلْكَ الأُمْسِيَاتُ مِنْ أَجْمَلِ ذِكْرَيَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Те večeri bile su među njihovim najlijepšim uspomenama.
sentences.translationEn: Those evenings were among their most beautiful memories.
